name: Nut Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, brown sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and sifted dry ingredients together.
2. Add the chopped nuts to the mixture.
3. Shape the dough into rolls and wrap them in waxed paper.
4. Chill the rolls overnight in the refrigerator.
5. Slice the chilled rolls at 350°F (175°C) for 8-10 minutes.
